---
title: "Oocyte Sensitivity"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-06"
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

#Load required packages
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(janitor)
library(ggplot2)
library(MASS)

library(here)
here::here()

freshdata <- read_csv(
  here("data","processed","freshdata_cleaned_new.csv"),
  name_repair = "minimal"
)
```

## Derive mature oocyte sensitivity index: number mature oocytes / total stim dose x 1000
```{r}
freshdata <- freshdata %>%
  mutate(
    MOSI = (No_mature_eggs / Total_stim_dose) * 1000
  )

hist(freshdata$MOSI, breaks = 20)
hist(log(freshdata$MOSI))


freshdata <- freshdata %>%
  mutate(
    Stim_regimen = case_when(
      FSH_used == 1 & hMG_used == 0 ~ "FSH_only",
      FSH_used == 0 & hMG_used == 1 ~ "hMG_only",
      FSH_used == 1 & hMG_used == 1 ~ "Dual",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )
```

## Handling categorical variables
```{r}
freshdata$Aetiology_group <- factor(freshdata$Aetiology_group)
freshdata$Stim_regimen <- factor(freshdata$Stim_regimen)
freshdata$Protocol_type <- factor(freshdata$Protocol_type)
```

```{r}
lm1 <- lm(log(MOSI) ~ Age + Baseline_AMH + Baseline_total_follicles + Aetiology_group,
          data = freshdata)
plot(lm1)
shapiro.test(residuals(lm1)) ##p>0.05 therefore we assume constant variance

#ggplot(freshdata, aes(x = Baseline_AMH, y = log(MOSI))) +
  #geom_point() +
  #geom_smooth(method = "lm")
```

```{r}
summary(lm1)
```
## Interaction

```{r}
lm2 <- lm(log(MOSI) ~ Age + Baseline_AMH * Baseline_total_follicles + Aetiology_group,
          data = freshdata)

summary(lm2)
```
```{r}
lm3 <- lm(log(MOSI) ~ Age + Baseline_AMH + Baseline_total_follicles + 
    Aetiology_group + Stim_regimen + FSH_initial_dose + hMG_initial_dose + GnRH_antagonist_total_dose, data = freshdata)


summary(lm3)
```
```{r}
##Is there a difference in MOSI and mature oocytes between the different stimulation regimens
kruskal.test(MOSI ~ Stim_regimen, data = freshdata)
kruskal.test(No_mature_eggs ~ Stim_regimen, data = freshdata)


pairwise.wilcox.test(freshdata$MOSI,
                     freshdata$Stim_regimen,
                     p.adjust.method = "bonferroni")
```
```{r}
##Is there a difference in age between patients on the different stim regimens
kruskal.test(Age ~ Stim_regimen, data = freshdata)

pairwise.wilcox.test(freshdata$Age,
                     freshdata$Stim_regimen,
                     p.adjust.method = "bonferroni")
```

```{r}
ggplot(freshdata, aes(x = Stim_regimen, y = Age)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal()


library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

freshdata <- freshdata %>%
  mutate(
    Stim_regimen = factor(
      Stim_regimen,
      levels = c("FSH_only", "hMG_only", "Dual"),
      labels = c("FSH only", "hMG only", "Dual")
    )
  )

ggplot(freshdata, aes(x = Stim_regimen, y = Age, fill = Stim_regimen)) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.6, outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5, size = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Age distribution by stimulation regimen",
    x = "Stimulation regimen",
    y = "Age (years)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
```

## Mature eggs

```{r}
lm4 <- lm(No_mature_eggs ~ Baseline_endometrium + Baseline_AMH + Baseline_total_follicles + Age * Aetiology_group + Total_stim_dose, Last_day_of_stim,
          data = freshdata)

summary(lm4)

plot(lm4)
shapiro.test(residuals(lm4))
```

```{r}
nb1 <- glm.nb(No_mature_eggs ~ Baseline_endometrium + Baseline_AMH + Baseline_total_follicles + Age * Aetiology_group,
  data = freshdata)

summary(nb1)
```

```{r}
lm5 <- lm(No_mature_eggs ~ Baseline_total_follicles + Baseline_AMH + Age + Baseline_endometrium + Stim_regimen + Aetiology_group * Total_stim_dose + FSH_initial_dose + hMG_initial_dose, data = freshdata)
summary(lm5)

plot(lm5)


#nb2 <- glm.nb(No_mature_eggs ~ Baseline_total_follicles + Baseline_AMH + Age + Baseline_endometrium + Stim_regimen + Aetiology_group * Total_stim_dose + FSH_initial_dose + hMG_initial_dose + Last_day_of_stim, data = freshdata)
#summary(nb2)
```
```{r}
sum(freshdata$Stim_regimen == "FSH_only", na.rm = TRUE)
sum(freshdata$Stim_regimen == "FSH_only" & is.na(freshdata$Baseline_AMH))
```

```{r}
baseline_df <- freshdata %>%
  dplyr::select(
    Unique_number,
    Aetiology_group,
    Age,
    BMI,
    Baseline_AMH,
    Baseline_total_follicles,
    Baseline_endometrium,
    Protocol_type, 
    No_mature_eggs
  )

write_csv(
  baseline_df,
  here("data", "processed", "baseline_data.csv")
)
```
